task_completion.description: Verify the 'Annual Maintenance Contract' item is configured for deferred revenue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Item form for 'Annual Maintenance Contract'. 'Maintain Stock' should be unchecked (or Item Group set to Services). In the 'Deferred Revenue' section, 'Enable Deferred Revenue' must be checked, 'Deferred Revenue Account' set to 'Deferred Revenue - WP', 'Default Income Account' set to 'Sales - WP', and 'No. of Months' set to 12.

task_completion.description: Verify the Sales Invoice is created for the correct customer and date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Sales Invoice form with Customer 'Green Energy Corp' and Posting Date '2026-01-01'.

task_completion.description: Verify the item details in the Sales Invoice for deferred revenue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the item table or item row details in the Sales Invoice. It should show 'Annual Maintenance Contract', Amount '$1,200.00', 'Enable Deferred Revenue' checked, 'Service Start Date' as '2026-01-01', and 'Service End Date' as '2026-12-31'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Sales Invoice is submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sales Invoice status badge. It should show 'Unpaid', 'Paid', or 'Overdue', but NOT 'Draft'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Process Deferred Accounting tool is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Process Deferred Accounting' form. It should have Type 'Income', Start Date '2026-01-01', End Date '2026-01-31', and Posting Date '2026-01-31'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Process Deferred Accounting document is submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Process Deferred Accounting' form status. It should show a 'Completed' or 'Submitted' status badge, indicating the revenue recognition journal entry was created.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ERPNext web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ERPNext web interface in a browser, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the forms naturally.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show typed text, dropdown selections, and normal UI interactions rather than injected HTML or developer console scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a database client.
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots should show a database client (like MySQL or psql) or terminal being used to insert records directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer: 'Green Energy Corp'. Item Code: 'Annual Maintenance Contract'. Liability Account: 'Deferred Revenue - WP'. Income Account: 'Sales - WP'. Total Amount: $1,200.00. Start Date: '2026-01-01'. End Date: '2026-12-31'. January End Date: '2026-01-31'.
